summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UCIM WebGL visualization app with focus on Web Component implementation and Shadow DOM functionality. All features working correctly including both React-wrapped and standalone Web Component routes, mobile CSS fallback, 16-second animation loop, and documentation files.
passed_tests: Main route (/) renders React-wrapped UCIM visualization with all 8 labels, orbital nodes, connections, bloom
Web Component route (/web-component) renders <ucim-visualization> custom element with Shadow DOM
Web Component has shadowRoot with canvas element inside
Web Component renders exactly 8 labels inside Shadow DOM
Web Component shows all orbital gold nodes, cyan connections, hex grid with bloom
Both routes show identical visual output (same 3D visualization)
CSS fallback renders correctly on mobile viewport (375px) for both routes
Web Component auto-loads Space Grotesk font (link[data-ucim-font] found in document.head)
No JavaScript console errors on either route
16-second animation loop works with assembly->hold->dissolve->restart phases
Shadow DOM properly isolates Web Component styles and elements
Mobile detection works correctly (< 768px triggers CSS fallback)
CSS fallback includes all elements: 8 nodes, 24 particles, SVG connections, animated center
Space Grotesk font auto-loading functionality working
WebGL bloom post-processing visible on both routes
IntersectionObserver functionality working for performance optimization
